summary: VenuLoQ venue detail page declutter and callback request feature verified. Hero buttons simplified (3 only: Back, Share, Favorite), callback form popup works correctly with POST /api/callback-request API.

hero_back_button.details: Back button (chevron-left) present in hero top-left

hero_share_button.details: Share button present in hero top-right

hero_favorite_button.details: Favorite/Save heart button present in hero top-right

hero_no_compare_button.details: Compare button correctly NOT in hero area (removed as per requirements)

venue_name_on_hero.details: Venue name 'Taj Mahal Palace Mumbai' displayed overlaid on hero image

venue_location_rating_on_hero.details: Location (Colaba, Mumbai), rating (4.9), and type (Hotel) visible on hero

photos_link_at_bottom.details: '5 photos' link visible at bottom of hero image with dot indicators

quick_stats_row.details: Stats row shows Veg/plate (₹6.5K), Non-veg/plate (₹8.0K), Max guests (1500)

about_section.details: About section with description and event type tags (Wedding, Reception, Corporate, Engagement)

amenities_section.details: Amenities section shows checkmarks with icons (Parking, Valet, AC, etc.)

sticky_cta_buttons.details: Sticky CTA shows 'CONNECT' and 'START PLANNING' buttons

connect_opens_bottom_sheet.details: Clicking Connect opens bottom sheet with WhatsApp and Callback options

request_callback_popup.details: Clicking 'Request a Callback' shows simple name+phone form popup (NOT full enquiry form)

callback_form_submission.details: Submitting form with name 'Test User' and phone '9876543210' shows success message

callback_api_response.details: POST /api/callback-request returns callback_id (cb_xxx), message, and rm_name

login_page_clean.details: Login page clean single-screen - no role selector, has Google auth + email/password

search_page_compact_cards.details: Search page shows compact venue cards with rating badges, prices, and area filters

context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue detail page hero now has only 3 buttons (Back, Share, Favorite). 'Request a Callback' in Connect bottom sheet shows a simple name+phone form that submits to POST /api/callback-request. API auto-assigns RM and returns callback_id, message, rm_name. Cream aesthetic applied throughout. Login page is clean without role selector.
